situation: SZ-BG-L-004 (low, route-fix): classifyChar CJK regex /[一-鿿㐀-䶿]/ only covers U+4E00-9FFF + U+3400-4DBF (basic block + Extension A). Misses Extension B-F (U+20000-3134F), Compatibility Ideographs (U+F900-FAFF), and Supplement (U+2F800-2FA1F). E-commerce product images with rare/traditional characters would be misclassified as 'symbol' and excluded from word count.
action: Replaced regex test with codePointAt-based range checks covering all 9 CJK Unicode blocks. Added comment documenting each range. Existing for-of iteration in countChars already handles surrogate pairs correctly (ES6+ iterates by code point), so no change needed there despite initial concern.
outcome_evidence: Commit 3d96b9c on auto/opt-background-1783213292 pushed to origin. npx vitest run tests/counter.test.ts: 16/16 passed. Diff: +23/-2 lines, single file.
next_suggestion: SZ-BG-L-005: uploadImage retry chain does not indicate retry count in error (low, route-fix)
